user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: Dark Horse Espresso Bar (near AGO)
fields.description: Popular specialty coffee shop a short walk from the Art Gallery — quick espresso drinks and light pastries, good for a short break before the museum.

insertion_point.reasoning: Workshop ends at 11:00 AM and AGO starts at 12:00 PM; inserting a 11:15–11:45 coffee break fills the gap and position 2 places it right before the AGO visit.
